---
title: "Projects"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
source("./site_libs/script.R")
load_libraries()
file <- "projects"
entries <- read_csv(glue("{datapath}entries.csv")) ## entries data set
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
render_all()
```

```{r main}
nav()
print_newline()
print_project(entries)
footer(file)
```
